scripts.dev:api: npm run typecheck && npm --workspace @dudesign/api run dev
scripts.start:api: npm run typecheck && npm --workspace @dudesign/api run start
scripts.start:worker: npm run typecheck && npm --workspace @dudesign/api run start:worker
scripts.test: npm run test:artifact-store && npm run test:runtime-gateway && npm run test:runtime-adapter && npm run test:api
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/contracts packages/domain packages/artifact-store packages/runtime-gateway apps/runtime-adapter apps/api apps/web apps/admin
